description: Single source of truth for agent roster. 5-agent slim roster (v4.2). All docs (README, AGENT-MODEL, AGENTS, ROUTING) derive counts/tiers from this file. Edit here, run `reconcile.sh --fix` to propagate.

claude.role: Architect — planning, verification, browser MCP, judgment

gemini.role: Auditor — broad scan, batch refactor, agentic coding via Antigravity

chatgpt.role: Generalist — frontier coding + reasoning + computer use

codex.role: Surgeon — per-file surgical patch via Codex CLI/IDE

gemma.role: Local generalist — quick fix, VN content, multimodal, 0 cost

status_legend.limited: 🟡 used <3 tasks/30d or specialist-legacy — verify before dispatch
status_legend.dormant: 🟡 never used or >30d idle — keep registered but deprioritize
status_legend.inactive: 🔴 paused / quota exhausted — do not dispatch

removed_in_v4_2.note: Removed 6 aspirational agents (Poolside, Laguna, Arcee, Nemotron, Grok, Ling, StepFun) that were never operationally available. Historical LEADERBOARD entries preserved for audit trail. Their AGENTS/*.md CV files deleted.
